title: Minicheck
description: Schema for a Minicheck — a deterministic pre-evaluation check on a ModelWorkPacket output. Candidate only, no live inference.

input_ref.description: Reference to the candidate artifact or work output being checked

modelworkpacket_ref.description: Reference to the ModelWorkPacket that produced the candidate

route_class_ref.description: Scale ladder route class that produced the candidate

pass_conditions.description: Conditions under which this check passes

fail_conditions.description: Conditions under which this check fails

warning_conditions.description: Conditions under which this check warns

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this minicheck does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — minicheck output is candidate only

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this minicheck does not claim or prove
